title: Clarification with regard to companies (Accounting Standards) Amendment Rules, 2016
description: Clarification with regard to companies (Accounting Standards) Amendment Rules, 2016
file_title: Clarification with regard to companies (Accounting Standards) Amendment Rules, 2016.pdf
text: ceneral Circular No.r*/20 16 F. No.01/01/2009-CL-V Government of India Ministry of Corporate Affairs Sth Floor, A Wing, Shastri Bhavan, Dr R.P. Road, New Delhi Dare& 276 April,2016 To All Regional Directors, AII Registrars of Companies, All Stakeholders. Subject: Clarification with regard to Companies (Accounting Standards) Amendment Rules 2016 Sir, Stakeholders have sought clarifications with regard to the accountlng period fo. which the accounts would need to be prepared using the Accounting Standards, as amended tirough the Companies (Accounting Standards) Amendment Rules, 2016. The matter has been examined in the Ministry and it is hereby clarifled that the amended Accounting Standards should be used for preparation of accounts for accounting periods commencing on or after the date of notification. This issues with the approval of the competent authority. Copy to:- l. e-Governance Section the Ministry website 2. Cuard File Yours faithfullv .A .t. ' q\tL (Sudhir Kapoor) Deputy Director and web contents Officer to place this circular on -- 1 of 1 --
